record.question: Nhân viên probation có được remote work không và giới hạn bao nhiêu ngày?
record.answer:
- Nguồn hr_remote_work.md: # HR Remote Work Policy - Probation employees may request remote work only after manager approval. - During probation, remote work is limited to 2 days per week unless HR approves an exception. - The employee must keep daily check-ins and remain reachable during core hours. - Sources: HR Remote Work Policy.
- Sources: hr_remote_work.md
record.route_reason: task contains internal policy retrieval keywords
